description: Get the result of a quarantine operation: traps-event-quarantine-result
name: traps-get-endpoint-by-id

outputs.description: The ID of the endpoint. Traps.Endpoint.Name The name of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Traps.Endpoint.ID

outputs.description: date The domain of the endpoint. Traps.Endpoint.Platform
outputs.name: Traps.Endpoint.Domain

outputs.description: The OS of the endpoint. Traps.Endpoint.Status The status of the endpoint.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The IP address of the endpoint. Traps.Endpoint.ComputerSid The computer SID.
outputs.name: Traps.Endpoint.IP

outputs.description: Whether the endpoint is compromised. Traps.Endpoint.OsVersion The version of the OS on the endpoint.
outputs.name: Traps.Endpoint.IsCompromised

outputs.description: The OS type of the endpoint. Traps.Endpoint.OsProductName The name of the OS on the endpoint.
outputs.name: Traps.Endpoint.OsProductType

outputs.description: The bitness of the OS on the endpoint. Traps.Endpoint.LastSeen The date/time of the last active ping.
outputs.name: Traps.Endpoint.Is64

outputs.description: The last active user on the machine.
outputs.name: Traps.Endpoint.LastUser
